message:
feat(engine): add 20 deep integration tests for policy controller

- policy_controller (20 tests): loss matrix ops, posterior distribution,
  guardrail blocking, expected-loss-minimizing selection, safe default
  fallback, decision sequencing, serde roundtrips, error handling
